paymentCreate.note: Official provider payment request/signature generated and accepted in staging.

paymentSceneCoverage.note: Verify every enabled provider scene with the intended platform or agent merchant account.

paymentCallback.note: Official callback signature/decrypt accepted and matched local order.

amountMismatchCallback.note: Amount mismatch produced reconciliation discrepancy without changing order status.

refundRequest.note: Provider refund request returned accepted/processing/success with provider refund number.

refundNotification.note: Provider refund notification verified, parsed and completed local refund through shared service.

refundQuery.note: Provider refund query verified response signature and synced final status.

statementFetch.note: Provider statement download parsed rows and matched local orders.

agentAccountRouting.note: Agent order used the locked agent payment account for pay, callback and refund.

agentTransfer.note: Verify agent automatic transfer in staging after the provider transfer product is enabled.

rollbackPlan.note: Rollback steps rehearsed or reviewed before enabling production traffic.

steps: Disable WECHAT_PAY_ENABLED/ALIPAY_ENABLED if provider callbacks keep failing.
Use finance reconciliation and refund provider scan before re-opening real payment.
